questionHtml: Label, on the diagram with the letter P, the point on the ct′ axis whose ct′ coordinate is 1.00 ly.
markschemeHtml:
identifies point with coordinates x = 0, ct = 0.60 on vertical axis ✓

draws line parallel to the x prime axis until it intersects the prime ct axis ✓

 

Award [2] for correct position of P without working shown.

meta.title: Label, on the diagram with the letter P, the point on the ct′ axis whose ct′ coordinate is 1.00 ly.
